# GDB Media & Marketing

> Web design and digital marketing agency building fast, affordable websites for tradies and small businesses across Australia — plumbers, electricians, gardeners, barbers, cafés, music studios and other local trades.

GDB Media & Marketing is based in Melbourne, Australia and works with local businesses Australia-wide. Services: website design and branding, website copy and photography guidance, SEO (getting found on Google and in AI search), and social media marketing. Every build is quoted as a fixed price up front, the finished website belongs to the client, and enquiries receive a reply within one business day.

Key facts:
- Who it's for: tradies and small local businesses (plumbers, electricians, gardeners, barbers, cafés, music studios, and similar)
- Where: Australia-wide, based in Melbourne VIC
- Services: website design, branding, content and copywriting, SEO / local search optimisation, social media marketing
- Pricing: fixed-price quotes, free to request, no lock-in contracts
- Contact: info@gdbmedia.com.au (replies within one business day)

## Pages
- [Home](https://gdbmedia.com.au/): What GDB Media builds, services (websites & branding, photos & content, SEO & getting found), how we work, and FAQ.
- [Our Work](https://gdbmedia.com.au/work): Portfolio of websites built for local trades, filterable by trade.
- [Contact](https://gdbmedia.com.au/contact): Get a free, fixed-price website quote — reply within one business day.
